items.taskSummary: Confirmed the next phase is release-readiness review / curated PR boundary, not new feature work.
Ran the full local release-readiness matrix: workspace tests, build, launchers, self-host smoke, autopilot smoke, deck-route smoke, JSON parse, and diff hygiene.
Reviewed release-facing docs and checklist for stable-vs-RC boundaries and external-skill overpromising.
Recorded local release-readiness as accepted and pointed the next step to curated commit / PR packaging.
Kept publish/tag/global skill mutation out of scope; the dirty worktree still needs curated commit boundaries.
